prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: tutorial and onboarding UI component pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sheet for first-run guidance UI elements.
Subject: tooltip panel frame, compact callout frame, control prompt frame, drag gesture icon, highlight ring, confirm button frame, warning/help badge.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI chrome, calm and highly readable on mobile.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet with separated components and consistent padding.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta background #FF00FF only.
Color palette: dark slate, soft gold trim, cyan/teal guidance accents, muted parchment tones, but no magenta key color.
Constraints: single exact #FF00FF background, no checkerboard, no gradient, no texture, no shadows/glow/particles touching background, no frame/panel/matte backdrop outside actual UI components, no text, no watermark.
Avoid: do not use #FF00FF or near-magenta tones inside UI artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
